global.description: The ad features a blue background with various graphic elements and text promoting a streaming service.
global.main_message: Promoting binge-watching with a free trial offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: top background area
elements.description: A solid blue background occupying the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: central graphic area
elements.description: A large central area featuring abstract shapes, possibly representing content or media.

elements.label: secondary graphic area
elements.description: Another central area with a different abstract shape, complementing the main subject.

elements.label: additional graphic area
elements.description: A smaller central area with a rectangular shape, adding visual interest.

elements.label: small graphic area
elements.description: A smaller graphic area that is rectangular and positioned centrally.

elements.label: graphic overlay area
elements.description: An overlay graphic area that is larger and positioned centrally.

elements.label: small central graphic
elements.description: A small rectangular graphic area located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Binge starts now Cancel anytime' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in white, located at the bottom.

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: A small logo labeled 'PulsePlay' in white, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: user-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white, located near the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, promoting binge-watching and free trial.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and UGC tag are at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, Try for free, PulsePlay, UGC
